message:
fix(sse): reset event state on empty lines without data to prevent stale field leakage

The SSE parser was only resetting event state when it encountered a
blank line AND had_data was true. When a blank line appeared between
events that had no data field, the parser left stale event-type and
data values in the current buffer, which could leak into the next
legitimate event.

Now properly resets to defaults (event="message", data cleared) on
blank-line boundaries regardless of whether data was accumulated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
